title: Create: Northstar - Structures
description: An addon that adds structures to the planets of Northstar Redux.
body:
# Northstar Structures
A small addon for the Northstar mod that adds natural formations and dungeons to the planet's surface.
This mod is still in early development — content is limited for now, but more structures are on the way!


  **Always back up your world before installing this mod.**
 This mod generates new structures in your world. Installing it on an existing save without a backup may cause unexpected changes to already-explored chunks.



### Features

New craters and dungeons generated naturally across the Northstar planet
Multiple crater variants: Huge, Old Huge, and the massive Aitken crater
More structures planned for future updates

### Finding Structures
In Creative / via command:
Use /findmoonstructure to locate nearby structures instantly.
In Survival:
Craft the Lunar Compass and right-click to open the search GUI.  — coordinates, distance, and details will be displayed.

### South Pole–Aitken Basin
Disabled by default.
Enable it manually in the config file if you want it to generate.
Warning: this structure heavily modifies terrain generation.
